name: clode-test-harness
description: Test-only harness dependencies for clode's PTY/TUI tests. Kept OUT of the root package.json on purpose: the root node_modules must stay free of the shipped runtime deps (semver/ws/yaml/string-width/strip-ansi/wrap-ansi) or the fail-loud ext-dep tests would resolve them and stop failing. Installed into test/node_modules via `npm install --prefix test`; never shipped (the npm files allowlist excludes test/).
